__fixture__.name: air_gapped_install_offline_bundle
__fixture__.scenario: Air-gapped self-hosted profile installs a package from an offline-bundle registry that requires native compilation. No registry credential is required because the offline bundle is locally trusted; mirror-or-offline state is offline_air_gapped_using_offline_bundle_only. Lockfile gains entries; rollback is blocked because native artifacts must be recompiled. Apply completes clean. Validates offline-bundle disclosure, mirror_or_offline_state required when transport posture is offline_air_gapped, and native-build script-risk on an air-gapped profile.
acceptance_bullets: 1: lockfile / transitive / rollback truth before apply
3: native compilation never relabelled as metadata-only

registry_source.registry_disclosure: Offline bundle registry; bundle snapshot is the authoritative source on this air-gapped profile.

registry_auth.auth_disclosure: Offline bundle does not require a registry credential.

script_risk.script_risk_disclosure: Native compilation runs against the local air-gapped toolchain; this is not a metadata-only update.

lockfile_impact.lockfile_impact_disclosure: Two new entries are added from the offline bundle; no transitive crosses a major boundary.

transitive_impact.transitive_impact_disclosure: One transitive added within the minor floor.

rollback_posture.rollback_blocker_note: Air-gapped toolchain has no remote rebuild; rollback requires a local recompile pass.
rollback_posture.rollback_posture_disclosure: Lockfile rollback is bounded by native artifact recompile.

mirror_or_offline_state.mirror_or_offline_state_disclosure: Air-gapped; offline-bundle-only origin; no direct external traffic.

apply_outcome_note: Install completed cleanly; native artifacts compiled.

transport_posture_at_event.transport_posture_note: Air-gapped profile; offline-bundle root of trust; no direct egress.
